message: 🆘 एम्स दिल्ली में एक भयंकर एक्सीडेंट हुआ है। 4 यूनिट O+ ब्लड तुरंत चाहिए। मरीज की हालत गंभीर है और खून लगातार बह रहा है। कोई मदद कर सके तो कॉल करें 9812345678
message_english: 🆘 A terrible accident has happened at AIIMS Delhi. 4 units of O+ blood needed immediately. The patient's condition is serious and bleeding continuously. If anyone can help, call 9812345678

message: KEM मुंबई के ICU में AB- ब्लड की 2 यूनिट अभी चाहिए। बहुत क्रिटिकल सिचुएशन है। कृपया जो भी आसपास हो डोनर बनकर आएं।
message_english: 2 units of AB- blood needed right now in KEM Mumbai's ICU. Very critical situation. Please whoever is nearby come as a donor.

message: सफदरजंग अस्पताल में आग से झुलसे मरीज के लिए 3 यूनिट B+ खून की अत्यंत आवश्यकता है। 1 घंटे के अंदर ट्रांसफ्यूजन होना है।
message_english: 3 units of B+ blood are urgently needed for a burn victim at Safdarjung Hospital. Transfusion needs to be done within 1 hour.

message: अपोलो चेन्नई में एक नवजात शिशु जिंदगी और मौत से लड़ रहा है। 1 यूनिट A- ब्लड की बहुत जरूरत है। प्लीज तुरंत हेल्प करें 9988776655
message_english: A newborn baby is fighting for life and death at Apollo Chennai. 1 unit of A- blood is badly needed. Please help immediately 9988776655

message: मेदांता अस्पताल में ऑर्गन फेल्योर का केस है। 5 यूनिट O- खून तुरंत चाहिए। डोनर जल्द से जल्द पहुंचे 8888000011।
message_english: Organ failure case at Medanta Hospital. 5 units of O- blood needed immediately. Donor please reach as soon as possible 8888000011.

message: लीलावती मुंबई में इमरजेंसी सर्जरी के लिए 2 यूनिट B- खून की बहुत ज्यादा जरूरत है। समय नहीं है, कृपया आगे आएं।
message_english: 2 units of B- blood are greatly needed for emergency surgery at Lilavati Mumbai. There is no time, please come forward.

message: मैक्स साकेत में डेंगू के मरीज के प्लेटलेट्स बहुत गिर गए हैं। कल सुबह तक 2 यूनिट A+ ब्लड अरेंज करना है।
message_english: Dengue patient's platelets have dropped significantly at Max Saket. Have to arrange 2 units of A+ blood by tomorrow morning.

message: फोर्टिस गुड़गांव में मरीज का हीमोग्लोबिन 5 रह गया है। 1 यूनिट AB+ ब्लड चाहिए आज ही। कॉल 9123456780
message_english: Patient's hemoglobin is down to 5 at Fortis Gurgaon. 1 unit of AB+ blood needed today itself. Call 9123456780

message: नारायणा बैंगलोर में ब्लड कैंसर के इलाज के लिए 3 यूनिट O+ ब्लड की आवश्यकता है। जो भी दे सके कृपया संपर्क करें।
message_english: 3 units of O+ blood needed for blood cancer treatment at Narayana Bangalore. Whoever can donate please contact.

message: सर गंगा राम अस्पताल में इंटरनल ब्लीडिंग रोकने के लिए 2 यूनिट B+ ब्लड जल्द से जल्द चाहिए। नंबर 7000070000
message_english: 2 units of B+ blood needed as soon as possible to stop internal bleeding at Sir Ganga Ram Hospital. Number 7000070000

message: CMC वेल्लोर में जहर खाने के केस में 1 यूनिट O- ब्लड चाहिए। कृपया ग्रुप में पूछकर बताएं।
message_english: 1 unit of O- blood needed in a poisoning case at CMC Vellore. Please ask in the group and let me know.

message: पीजीआईएमईआर चंडीगढ़ में लिवर डैमेज के मरीज को 2 यूनिट A- खून चाहिए। डोनर प्लीज 9090909090 पर बात करें।
message_english: 2 units of A- blood needed for a liver damage patient at PGIMER Chandigarh. Donor please talk on 9090909090.

message: KIMS हैदराबाद में अगले हफ्ते सिजेरियन डिलीवरी है। 2 यूनिट B+ ब्लड की व्यवस्था करनी है। कोई डोनर हो तो बताएं।
message_english: Cesarean delivery is scheduled for next week at KIMS Hyderabad. Need to arrange 2 units of B+ blood. Let me know if there's any donor.

message: एम्स दिल्ली में थैलेसीमिया के मरीज के लिए रूटीन 1 यूनिट A+ ब्लड चाहिए। गुरुवार तक इंतजाम करना है। 9898989898
message_english: Routine 1 unit of A+ blood needed for a thalassemia patient at AIIMS Delhi. Have to arrange it by Thursday. 9898989898

message: अपोलो चेन्नई में बाईपास सर्जरी शेड्यूल है। 3 यूनिट O+ ब्लड की आवश्यकता होगी इस शुक्रवार। कृपया मदद करें।
message_english: Bypass surgery is scheduled at Apollo Chennai. 3 units of O+ blood will be needed this Friday. Please help.

message: मेदांता में किडनी स्टोन ऑपरेशन से पहले 1 यूनिट AB- ब्लड बैंक में जमा करना है। कोई डोनर हो तो मैसेज करें।
message_english: Need to deposit 1 unit of AB- in the blood bank before kidney stone operation at Medanta. If any donor is available, message me.

message: इस रविवार को दिल्ली के करोल बाग में एक विशाल रक्तदान शिविर है। कृपया आएं और अपना योगदान दें।
message_english: There is a huge blood donation camp at Karol Bagh, Delhi this Sunday. Please come and make your contribution.

message: मेरे पिता के लिए मुंबई में रक्तदान करने वाले सभी लोगों का हृदय से धन्यवाद। वह अब बिल्कुल स्वस्थ हैं। 🙏
message_english: Heartfelt thanks to everyone who donated blood for my father in Mumbai. He is completely healthy now. 🙏

message: क्या कोई बता सकता है कि ब्लड प्रेशर की दवा खाने वाले लोग रक्तदान कर सकते हैं या नहीं?
message_english: Can anyone tell whether people taking blood pressure medication can donate blood or not?

message: चंडीगढ़ रेड क्रॉस ब्लड बैंक में हर शनिवार डोनर रजिस्ट्रेशन होता है। कृपया जाएं और अपना नाम दर्ज कराएं।
message_english: Donor registration happens every Saturday at Chandigarh Red Cross Blood Bank. Please go and register your name.

message: Bhai log Fortis Gurgaon me highway crash ka victim aaya hai. 3 unit O- blood URGENTLY chahiye!! Pls koi jaldi aao 9811122233
message_english: Brothers, a highway crash victim has come to Fortis Gurgaon. 3 units of O- blood URGENTLY needed!! Pls someone come quickly 9811122233

message: KEM Mumbai me patient ko severe heart attack aya hai. 4 unit A+ blood ki immediate requirement hai. Please RT kare 🆘
message_english: Patient has suffered a severe heart attack at KEM Mumbai. There is an immediate requirement for 4 units of A+ blood. Please RT 🆘

message: Safdarjung hospital Delhi me accident trauma ki wajah se 2 unit B+ blood abhi ke abhi chahiye! Time nahi hai bilkul.
message_english: Due to accident trauma at Safdarjung hospital Delhi, 2 units of B+ blood are needed right now! There is absolutely no time.

message: Narayana Bangalore me severe hemorrhage ho raha hai patient ko. 5 unit AB+ blood ki bohot urgent need hai. Call 9990001112
message_english: Patient is having severe hemorrhage at Narayana Bangalore. There is a very urgent need for 5 units of AB+ blood. Call 9990001112

message: NICU me baby critical hai Sir Ganga Ram Delhi me. 2 unit O+ blood chahiye emergency me. Please jo aas paas ho jaldi aaye.
message_english: Baby is critical in NICU at Sir Ganga Ram Delhi. 2 units of O+ blood needed in emergency. Whoever is nearby, please come quickly.

message: Lilavati Mumbai me brain surgery beech me ruki hai due to blood loss. 3 unit A- blood ekdum turant zaroorat hai. Pls help!!
message_english: Brain surgery is paused midway due to blood loss at Lilavati Mumbai. 3 units of A- blood are needed absolutely immediately. Pls help!!

message: CMC Vellore me extreme poison emergency hai. 1 unit B- blood chahiye turant blood change ke liye. Call 8888000011
message_english: Extreme poison emergency at CMC Vellore. 1 unit of B- blood needed immediately for blood change. Call 8888000011

message: AIIMS Delhi trauma center me fire incident ka critical burn patient laya gaya hai. 4 unit AB- blood chahiye. Please donate kare.
message_english: A critical burn patient from a fire incident has been brought to AIIMS Delhi trauma center. 4 units of AB- blood needed. Please donate.

message: KIMS Hyderabad me delivery ke baad condition extreme bad hai. 2 unit O- blood chahiye for emergency c-section bleeding.
message_english: Condition is extremely bad after delivery at KIMS Hyderabad. 2 units of O- blood needed for emergency c-section bleeding.

message: Max Saket me tumor surgery ke dauran heavy bleeding start ho gayi. 3 unit A+ blood chahiye by evening. Drop a text at 7777766666
message_english: Heavy bleeding started during tumor surgery at Max Saket. 3 units of A+ blood needed by evening. Drop a text at 7777766666

message: Apollo Chennai me dengue se platelets sirf 10k bache hain. 2 unit B+ blood required hai kal subah tak. Kisi ko lead pata hai?
message_english: Platelets are down to just 10k due to dengue at Apollo Chennai. 2 units of B+ blood required by tomorrow morning. Does anyone know a lead?

message: Medanta me patient highly anemic hai, hemoglobin 6 hai. 1 unit O+ blood ka prabandh karna hai kal dopahar tak.
message_english: Patient is highly anemic at Medanta, hemoglobin is 6. Have to arrange 1 unit of O+ blood by tomorrow afternoon.

message: PGIMER Chandigarh me dialysis me complication aayi hai. 2 unit AB+ chahiye donor. Blood bank khali hai. Call 9988998899
message_english: Complication during dialysis at PGIMER Chandigarh. Need 2 units of AB+ donor. Blood bank is empty. Call 9988998899

message: Fortis Gurgaon me chemo support ke liye 1 unit A- blood chahiye jaldi se. Pls DM me koi free ho toh.
message_english: 1 unit of A- blood needed quickly for chemo support at Fortis Gurgaon. Pls DM me if anyone is free.

message: KEM Mumbai me pre-op blood test me Hb bohot low aya hai. 3 unit B- blood chahiye raat 8 baje tak. Please check and tell.
message_english: Hb came very low in pre-op blood test at KEM Mumbai. 3 units of B- blood needed by 8 PM tonight. Please check and tell.

message: Sir Ganga Ram Delhi me bleeding ulcer ka case hai. 2 unit O- blood chahiye reserve me rakhne ke liye kal subah tak.
message_english: Bleeding ulcer case at Sir Ganga Ram Delhi. 2 units of O- blood needed to keep in reserve by tomorrow morning.

message: Narayana Bangalore me blood count achanak drop ho gaya hai. 1 unit A+ required urgently aaj hi. Contact 9123491234
message_english: Blood count has suddenly dropped at Narayana Bangalore. 1 unit of A+ required urgently today itself. Contact 9123491234

message: Lilavati Mumbai me urgent liver surgery schedule hui hai. 4 unit B+ chahiye kal dopehar tak for safe side.
message_english: Urgent liver surgery has been scheduled at Lilavati Mumbai. 4 units of B+ needed by tomorrow afternoon for safe side.

message: CMC Vellore me dada ji ki planned hip replacement hai Friday ko. Blood bank ne 2 unit O+ deposit karne ko bola hai.
message_english: Grandfather's planned hip replacement is on Friday at CMC Vellore. The blood bank has asked to deposit 2 units O+.

message: Routine chemo ke waqt KIMS Hyderabad me 1 unit A- blood chahiye hoga next week. Koi bhi healthy donor free ho toh bataye 8000080000
message_english: 1 unit A- blood will be needed during routine chemo next week at KIMS Hyderabad. If any healthy donor is free please tell 8000080000

message: AIIMS Delhi me planned spine surgery ke liye 2 unit B+ blood arrange karna hai Wednesday ko. Doctor ne bola abhi se donor ready rakho.
message_english: Need to arrange 2 units B+ blood for planned spine surgery at AIIMS Delhi on Wednesday. Doctor said to keep the donor ready from now.

message: Apollo Chennai me scheduled dialysis start honi hai Tuesday ko. 1 unit AB+ blood dena padega hospital me replacement ke liye.
message_english: Scheduled dialysis is to start at Apollo Chennai on Tuesday. Will have to give 1 unit AB+ blood in the hospital for replacement.

message: Upcoming tumor removal surgery ke liye Safdarjung hospital me 3 unit O- blood chahiye aane wale somvaar ke liye.
message_english: 3 units of O- blood are needed for upcoming tumor removal surgery at Safdarjung hospital for the coming Monday.

message: Elective heart surgery planned hai Medanta me is weekend. Blood bank ne 2 unit A+ blood secure karne ko bola hai safe side.
message_english: Elective heart surgery is planned at Medanta this weekend. Blood bank has told to secure 2 units A+ blood on the safe side.

message: Delhi NCR walo, is sunday Noida sec 18 me mega blood drive hai. Refreshment and certificate free milega. Jarur aao donate karne.
message_english: Delhi NCR folks, there is a mega blood drive in Noida sec 18 this Sunday. Refreshment and certificate will be free. Definitely come to donate.

message: Covid recovery ke kitne mahine baad blood donate kar sakte hain? Mujhe donation karna hai Mumbai me kal. Any idea?
message_english: How many months after Covid recovery can one donate blood? I have to donate in Mumbai tomorrow. Any idea?

message: Bangalore me jin bhi dosto ne blood diya unko bada wala Thank You! Meri mummy ab bilkul theek hain aur discharge ho gayi.
message_english: A big Thank You to all friends who gave blood in Bangalore! My mom is completely fine now and has been discharged.

message: Hyderabad me ek regular donor awareness campaign chal raha hai. Let's make a difference together and register in large numbers.
message_english: A regular donor awareness campaign is going on in Hyderabad. Let's make a difference together and register in large numbers.

message: Pune Sassoon blood bank ki timings kya hai weekend pe? Kisi ko pakka info pata hai kya group me?
message_english: What are the timings of Pune Sassoon blood bank on the weekend? Does anyone know the sure info in the group?

message: Chennai me NGOs ka koi contact list hai jo blood arrange karte hain emergency me? Society ke WhatsApp board ke liye chahiye.
message_english: Is there any contact list of NGOs in Chennai that arrange blood in emergency? Need it for the society's WhatsApp board.
